options.name: Daeva
options.description: Creatures of passion — beautiful, doomed, driven by desire.

options.name: Gangrel
options.description: Feral Kindred who embrace the Beast — shapechangers and wanderers.

options.name: Mekhet
options.description: Shadow-touched scholars and spies who dwell in secrets.

options.name: Nosferatu
options.description: Hideous Kindred who lurk in darkness and command primal fear.

options.name: Ventrue
options.description: Lords of the Danse Macabre — rulers and commanders born to lead.

options.name: Carthian Movement
options.description: Progressive reformers who believe Kindred society can evolve.

options.name: Circle of the Crone
options.description: Pagan spiritualists who worship the Crone and practice Crúac.

options.name: The Invictus
options.description: The aristocracy of the undead — tradition, power, and obligation.

options.name: Lancea et Sanctum
options.description: Sanctified Kindred who embrace their role as God's monsters.

options.name: Ordo Dracul
options.description: Students of the Dragon who seek to transcend the Kindred curse.

options.name: Unaligned
options.description: Beholden to no covenant — free, but without allies or protection.

powers.label: Disciplines
powers.description: Distribute 3 dots among your Disciplines. Clan Disciplines are available freely; others require a teacher.

items.name: Animalism
items.description: Dominion over beasts and the Beast within.

items.name: Dominate
items.description: The power to command minds and bend wills.

items.name: Majesty
items.description: Awe-inspiring presence that commands loyalty and desire.

items.name: Nightmare
items.description: The power to evoke and weaponize primal terror.

items.name: Obfuscate
items.description: The power to hide from sight and perception.

items.name: Protean
items.description: Shapeshifting and communion with the earth.

items.name: Resilience
items.description: Supernatural fortitude and resistance to damage.

items.name: Vigor
items.description: Monstrous physical strength beyond mortal limits.

items.name: Crúac
items.description: Pagan blood sorcery of the Circle of the Crone. Requires covenant membership.

items.name: Theban Sorcery
items.description: Sacred miracles of the Lancea et Sanctum. Requires covenant membership.
